data.title: Create recipe-engine-adapter.md adapter protocol contract
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Create plugins/dso/docs/contracts/recipe-engine-adapter.md documenting the engine adapter protocol contract. This is the interface that S2 (ts-morph adapter), S3 (scaffold-route adapters), and S4 (normalize-imports adapters) implement against.

### Contract must specify:
1. **Input format**: How recipe-executor.sh invokes adapters — environment variables it sets before calling the adapter, working directory conventions, adapter script location convention (plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/{engine}-adapter.sh)
2. **RECIPE_PARAM_* env var protocol**: How recipe parameters are passed (RECIPE_PARAM_{FIELD_NAME} in uppercase), why no shell interpolation
3. **Output format**: JSON printed to stdout with fields:
   - files_changed: array of file paths modified
   - transforms_applied: integer count of successful transforms
   - errors: array of error strings (empty on success)
   - exit_code: 0 on success, 1 on failure, 2 on degraded (engine missing/version mismatch)
   - degraded: boolean (true when engine unavailable)
   - engine_name: string (always present, used for diagnostics)
4. **Degraded status protocol**: When engine binary is not found or version is below min_engine_version, adapter exits with specific JSON and exit_code=2
5. **Rollback protocol**: Adapter must stash git changes before execution and pop/drop stash on success/failure
6. **Timeout protocol**: Adapter must respect RECIPE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS env var (default 600)
7. **Version check protocol**: How adapter validates engine version against min_engine_version from registry

The contract document must conform to the DSO contract schema requirements (level-1 heading starting with "# Contract:", "## Purpose" section, "## Signal Format" section with "### Canonical parsing prefix" for the JSON output format).

## Files to Create
- plugins/dso/docs/contracts/recipe-engine-adapter.md

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/docs/contracts/recipe-engine-adapter.md exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/docs/contracts/recipe-engine-adapter.md
- [ ] Contract document passes contract schema validation
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/check-contract-schemas.sh plugins/dso/docs/contracts/recipe-engine-adapter.md
- [ ] Contract specifies all RECIPE_PARAM_* env vars
  Verify: grep -q "RECIPE_PARAM" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/recipe-engine-adapter.md
- [ ] Contract specifies degraded status protocol with exit_code=2
  Verify: grep -q "degraded\|exit_code.*2" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/recipe-engine-adapter.md
- [ ] Contract specifies rollback protocol
  Verify: grep -q "stash\|rollback" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/recipe-engine-adapter.md
